title: Counter-Idiom Lab
public_claim: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate creative/culture site, with exact public page copy, a static prototype, and a 20-specimen seed corpus.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
